summary: The South Bay funding machine shows no signs of slowing: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), MatX (Mountain View), and Ayar Labs (San Jose) each landed $500M-plus rounds in March, while SiFive (Santa Clara) closed a $400M Series G this week. Across AI, chip design, and robotics, twenty-four companies raised capital over the past six weeks. Most South Bay firms are still hiring, though the pace of mega-rounds suggests investors are backing proven teams over experimental bets.
